contracts.label: Execution Run Record
contracts.purpose: parent/child execution lineage across supervisor, worker, and judge lanes

contracts.label: Scheduled Job Record
contracts.purpose: recurring cadence, last outcome, next run, and current state

contracts.label: Operator Stream Event
contracts.purpose: single event language for alerts, runs, escalations, and operator-visible state changes

contracts.label: Quota Lease Summary
contracts.purpose: provider posture, reserves, throttles, and recent outcomes

contracts.label: Command Decision Record
contracts.purpose: captures who decided, why, and under what policy class

contracts.label: Plan Packet
contracts.purpose: normalized supervisor-to-worker handoff for managed execution

contracts.label: Artifact Provenance Record
contracts.purpose: links outputs to runs, prompts, policies, lanes, and judges

contracts.label: Commitment Record
contracts.purpose: typed external or internal commitment with class, state, and proof posture

contracts.label: Counterparty Record
contracts.purpose: counterparty identity, boundary, and sensitivity for externalized work

contracts.label: Promise Deadline Record
contracts.purpose: deadline, due state, and escalation path for governed commitments

contracts.label: Follow-through State Record
contracts.purpose: delivery and acceptance posture for commitments over time

contracts.label: Deliverable Acceptance Record
contracts.purpose: captures who accepted a delivery and under what proof

contracts.label: Renegotiation Record
contracts.purpose: explicit renegotiation path when a promise cannot be met as originally stated

contracts.label: Externalization Gate Record
contracts.purpose: typed gate proving a draft or proposal may become an external commitment or delivery

contracts.label: Assumption Register
contracts.purpose: active assumptions that may guide exploration but not masquerade as observed truth

contracts.label: Inference Boundary Record
contracts.purpose: declares where inference is allowed, blocked, or review-gated

contracts.label: Belief Revision Policy
contracts.purpose: how new evidence revises or supersedes prior assumptions and inferred claims

contracts.label: Evidence Conflict Record
contracts.purpose: captures conflicts between runtime, registry, generated, and assumed truth layers

contracts.label: Supersession Record
contracts.purpose: links stale or assumed claims to fresher replacing evidence

contracts.label: Specialist Gate Class
contracts.purpose: high-risk review gate class that blocks externalization or widening without the right reviewer

contracts.label: Required Reviewer Role
contracts.purpose: explicit reviewer role demanded by a specialist gate or commitment class

contracts.label: Expert Routing Policy
contracts.purpose: routing rule from domain risk to reviewer role and gate class

contracts.label: Review Evidence Reference
contracts.purpose: artifact reference that proves the required review happened

contracts.label: Entity Boundary Class
contracts.purpose: machine-readable boundary separating personal, product, client, or regulated entities

contracts.label: Account Surface Class
contracts.purpose: machine-readable account boundary for operator, runtime, preview, or client surfaces

contracts.label: Counterparty Sensitivity Class
contracts.purpose: sensitivity posture for external counterparties or customer-facing data

contracts.label: Party Registry
contracts.purpose: registry schema for parties, owners, and counterparty boundaries

contracts.label: Canonical Vocabulary Registry
contracts.purpose: canonical nouns, aliases, and forbidden overlapping terms

contracts.label: Term Alias Record
contracts.purpose: allowed alias mapped to a canonical governed noun

contracts.label: Forbidden Alias Record
contracts.purpose: disallowed alias that would create duplicate or shadow authority

contracts.label: Portable Context Bundle
contracts.purpose: scoped export bundle that preserves provenance, contradiction audits, and rebuild-from-raw references

contracts.label: Session Handoff Bundle
contracts.purpose: explicit session handoff artifact between tools or providers

contracts.label: Control-plane Ingest Bundle
contracts.purpose: typed ingest artifact for importing external context into canonical control surfaces

contracts.label: Export Bundle Record
contracts.purpose: governed export record with scope, assumptions, and rebuild path

contracts.label: Interop Contract Record
contracts.purpose: protocol-specific portability contract for external tools or providers

contracts.label: Provider Exit Packet
contracts.purpose: bounded provider-exit and rebuild plan

contracts.label: Server Card Contract
contracts.purpose: discovery-only contract for MCP server-card style metadata

contracts.label: Well-known Metadata Record
contracts.purpose: governed discovery metadata record that must stay mutation-forbidden

contracts.label: Session Resumption Policy
contracts.purpose: policy describing when sessions may resume without duplicate authority or execution

contracts.label: Task Retry Policy
contracts.purpose: typed retry semantics for async task operations

contracts.label: Task Result Expiry Policy
contracts.purpose: policy describing result expiry and client visibility after completion

contracts.label: Task Retention Class
contracts.purpose: retention class for task results and async artifacts

contracts.label: Telemetry Semantic Convention Profile
contracts.purpose: pinned telemetry profile aligned to official OTel GenAI/MCP conventions

contracts.label: Telemetry Stability Pin Policy
contracts.purpose: pinning policy that prevents upstream convention churn from silently changing emitted telemetry

contracts.label: Trace Context Propagation Policy
contracts.purpose: scope-bound trace propagation rules across MCP and related boundaries

contracts.label: MCP Trace Meta Contract
contracts.purpose: required metadata on protocol-bearing surfaces using MCP semantics

contracts.label: Compatibility Alias Record
contracts.purpose: explicit compatibility shim with owner, reason, and scope

contracts.label: Compatibility Alias Expiry
contracts.purpose: expiry contract for compatibility shims so hidden rewrites cannot become permanent truth

contracts.label: Compatibility Alias Owner
contracts.purpose: named owner responsible for removing or renewing a compatibility shim

contracts.label: Compatibility Alias Removal Gate
contracts.purpose: removal condition proving a compatibility alias can be retired safely

contracts.label: Architecture Freeze Policy
contracts.purpose: policy that freezes new planes, loops, and speculative rewrites while publication debt is blocking

contracts.label: Rewrite Budget Policy
contracts.purpose: budget limiting canonical rewrites per publication wave

contracts.label: Canon Change Gate
contracts.purpose: required evidence and rollback contract before canonical architecture changes are allowed
